pr.title: Record: 11L + EMA + Tight SWA + QAT0.15 + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale (val_bpb: 1.1243)

output.summary: Stacks EMA with tight SWA plus earlier late QAT on a quantized 11-layer Transformer with VE128/Partial RoPE and longer warmdown.
techniques: - EMA averages feed Tight SWA checkpoints for dual smoothing
- Late int6 fake-quantization starts once LR scale dips below 0.15
- Extended warmdown alongside VE128 embeddings and Partial RoPE
